creator: eric.mauger@igf.cnrs.fr
text:
Hi,

I just tried a pkg upgrade vaultwarden has been upgraded to vaultwarden-1.30.5_4 install
It still works.

The I tried a freebsd-udate and it proposes to install
/lib/libc++.so.1
/lib/libzpool.so.2

I don't know why.
I have pkg+http://pkg.FreeBSD.org/${ABI}/quarterly

The libc++ comes from the core OS with freebsd-update

I think I'll try a fresh install.

Thanks
